howItWorks.intro: This social connection score calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Social Score
rules.formula: Score = Relationships + Interactions + Belonging + Loneliness factors

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: Strong social ties reduce mortality risk by 50%, comparable to quitting smoking.

faq.q: How many close relationships do I need?
faq.a: Research suggests 3-5 close relationships is optimal for mental health.

howWeCalculate.intro: This social connection score calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
Our algorithm applies the relevant formulas using your inputs
Results are calculated instantly in your browser — nothing is sent to a server
Review the detailed breakdown to understand how each factor affects your result
howWeCalculate.disclaimer: These calculations are estimates based on standard formulas. For critical decisions, always consult a qualified professional.
